name: post-conversion-buildout
scope: Automatic post-conversion genealogy buildout architecture. The post-conversion lane is API-free and follows the Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern: durable Markdown/JSON queues plus a non-API agent runtime.

hosted_cron.blocker: Codex app worktree automation fails before repo code runs with CreateProcessWithLogonW 1326.

pc_off_runner.auth: ChatGPT-managed Codex auth from CODEX_AUTH_JSON_B64 or CODEX_AUTH_JSON repository secret
activation_requirements: Workflow committed to the repository default branch.
Private repository secret CODEX_AUTH_JSON_B64 or CODEX_AUTH_JSON exists.

allowed_runtimes: subscription-backed agent session without repository API keys
human-started agent session consuming queue prompts
api_policy.pc_off_codex_requirement: Use a Codex-hosted execution environment that does not use the local Windows worktree sandbox.

privacy_policy.summary: Living-family privacy is not a standalone hold for this internal family project; the user explicitly approved internal use.
still_required: promotion explicitly enabled before canonical wiki edits

adaptive_conversion.summary: High-confidence, high-relevance pages request higher-fidelity conversion. High/critical relevance gets Pro; high/critical plus complexity or suspicious readings gets Pro with crops.
adaptive_conversion.idempotency: Do not repeat the same source/page/conversion tier once fulfilled; escalate only to a higher tier or retry released/failed work.
adaptive_conversion.context_rule: Family context is a verification hypothesis, not a correction. Example: if prior conversion says David Pulgar and project context suggests Dario Pulgar, the converter must verify visible letters and preserve uncertainty.
adaptive_conversion.hard_boundary: Ask the converter to double-check suspected readings; do not instruct it to change literal transcription to match outside evidence unless the visible source supports that reading.

probability_model.summary: Proof is scored by probability and evidence weight, not promoted/not-promoted as a truth binary.

startup_budget: changed files from the current batch

known_workspace_gap.summary: Several existing source packets reference raw/converted, raw/chunks, and raw/codex-conversion-jobs paths that are not present in this checkout. Current usable evidence starts from research/source-packets, research/claims, research/sources, and research/_assets/conversions.
known_workspace_gap.impact: Do proof review conservatively and mark claims that depend on missing converted/chunk artifacts as hold or needs-derivative-restoration when full source recheck is required.

lanes.next: API-free agent runner refreshes conversion-qc, records page relevance/confidence, and writes upgrade feedback for high-value pages.
Source-relevance feedback escalates high-value pages to Pro or Pro with crops without repeating fulfilled tiers; this lane records the request but does not call a provider API.
A non-API agent runner claims bounded evidence_extractor work from research/_agent-queues/evidence-extraction.json; local heartbeat does not extract manually.
identity_researcher workers compare staged identity/conflict candidates and write scored analysis notes under research/_staging/identity-analysis/ without merging canonical people.
A non-API agent runner generates/uses research/_agent-queues/proof-review.json from staged drafts and claims independent claim_reviewer tasks.
Promotion queue remains disabled unless the controller is run with -AllowPromotion and review notes explicitly recommend promotion.

claimed: Add controller that refreshes queues, leases tasks, writes worker prompts, and launches Codex workers
Replace local heartbeat execution with durable queue-and-agent architecture
done: Updated Post-Conversion Dashboard with controller commands
Generated proof-review and disabled wiki-promotion queues without launching workers
Paused the failing Codex app worktree automation after Windows sandbox launch errors
Set post-conversion policy to no provider model API keys
Documented hosted parallelism: prefer 3 independent tasks per run, up to 6 when disjoint and low-risk
blockers: raw/converted, raw/chunks, and raw/codex-conversion-jobs paths cited by some existing packets are absent in this checkout; the controller can still manage queues, but workers must hold claims when source derivatives are unavailable.
